flavorPool: Tyres are bald and the pads are squealing on every stop. Sort both before my shaken.
Feels like I'm driving on ice, and the pedal grinds now too.
Due a proper tyre and pad refresh, it's overdue.
Fit some coilovers for me, I want it lower and sharper.
Stock ride's too soft for how I drive. Get me something adjustable.
Want it hunkered down for real. Sort the coilovers.
Running hot in traffic. Sort the cooling before it strands me.
Temp gauge creeps up on every hill. Needs a cooling once-over.
Hard to start some mornings, and it stutters on the highway. Check the electrics.
Something's off with the ignition, it hesitates on startup.
Clutch is slipping under load. Fit me a proper one.
Pedal feels wrong and it's losing bite. Sort the clutch.
Ride's gone soft and wallowy, and it's sagging on one corner. Freshen up the suspension.
Bouncing over every bump these days. Dampers and springs both need attention.
Picked up a dent and some scrapes on the panel. Can you tidy it up?
Bodywork's looking rough. Sort the panel before it gets worse.
Long story. Slid off into a ditch last week, panel's dented, suspension's knocked out of shape, and I shredded a tyre. Sort all of it.
Rough night out there. Bent the panel, the ride's all over the place now, and I need a fresh tyre fitted.
Shaken's coming up. Underbody, brakes, and the exhaust all need to pass inspection.
Need it road-legal for the shaken: rust underneath, worn pads, and a rattly exhaust.
Stock gearbox can't take the abuse anymore. Build me a proper one.
Grinding through the gears. Time for a real gearbox upgrade.
Power's just spinning one wheel. Fit me a limited-slip differential.
Need better traction out of corners. Sort the diff.
Paint's faded and chipped all over. Give it a proper respray.
Wants a fresh coat of paint, top to bottom.
Seats are falling apart and the gauge cluster's looking tired. Retrim the interior.
Cabin's seen better days. Sort the seats and the dash.
Naturally aspirated isn't cutting it anymore. Get me some boost.
Time to go forced induction. Build me some real power.
Street turbo's not enough. I want a serious race setup, no compromises.
Money's no object, get me the biggest turbo kit you can fit.
Want a proper built motor. Internals and head both need the upgrade treatment.
Stock bottom end and head won't hold the power I'm after. Build it up.
Want this thing brought back to life: engine, paint, interior, wheels, all of it.
Full restoration, spare no detail. The motor, the paint, the seats, and fresh wheels.
